var code = "<h1 id=welcome-to-the-contributors-documentation>Welcome to the contributor’s documentation!</h1> <p>This site is built to grow. Once you’ve developed your contribution, you can <a href=mailto:universityprograms@aisc.org>email the maintainers</a> with your submission. Or, if you know how to use git, <a href=https://github.com/aisc-org/aisc-model-viewer>fork the repository</a> and make a pull request with your added content.</p> <p>This site is written in <a href=https://www.typescriptlang.org>TypeScript</a> and built using <a href=https://yarnpkg.com>Yarn</a>, <a href=https://webpack.js.org/ >webpack</a>, and <a href=https://pandoc.org/ >Pandoc</a> from the sources hosted at our <a href=https://github.com/aisc-org/aisc-model-viewer>GitHub repository</a>. You can <a href=./#Setting-up-a-development-environment>set up a development environment</a> to build the site on your own machine, but this is not necessary to contribute.</p> <h2 id=licensing>Licensing</h2> <p>If you are interested in contributing, please <a href=mailto:universityprograms@aisc.org>contact AISC University Programs</a> for more information about licensing and the technical review process.
