// Module
var code = "<h1 id=exporting-to-gltf>Exporting to glTF</h1> <p>Models for this site must be in <a href=https://www.khronos.org/gltf/ >glTF format</a>. You can preview your exported models using Don McCurdy’s <a href=https://gltf-viewer.donmccurdy.com/ >glTF viewer</a>.</p> <h2 id=blender>Blender</h2> <p>Blender natively supports exporting to glTF.</p> <h2 id=sketchup>SketchUp</h2> <p>There are two plugins available for SketchUp:</p> <ul> <li><a href=https://extensions.sketchup.com/extension/052071e5-6c19-4f02-a7e8-fcfcc28a2fd8/gltf-exporter>glTF Export</a> – free, but no longer supported or updated; limited control over export</li> <li><a href=https://www.simlab-soft.com/3d-plugins/Sketchup_GLTF_Exporter.aspx>SimLab GLTF Exporter</a> – costs money, gives more control over the export</li> </ul> ";
// Exports
module.exports = code;
